item.title: Version 1.7.8
item.description:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<style>
  body {
    font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #e0e0e0;
    background: #1e1e1e;
    margin: 16px 20px;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  h2 {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #ffffff;
    margin: 0 0 10px 0;
  }
  ul {
    margin: 4px 0 0 0;
    padding-left: 18px;
  }
  li {
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    color: #cccccc;
  }
  li strong {
    color: #ffffff;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
v1.7.8 — Authentication & Stability  Fixed a ghost login issue where reinstalling the app (via AppZapper or manual uninstall) would silently restore the previous session on next launch. WebKit session data and Keychain entries both survive macOS app uninstall; this release clears both on first launch after a fresh install.  Also fixed a layout glitch where the Claude gauge would briefly flash a "Connect" button during periodic refresh. 
</body>
</html>
